sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Ask for approval from users in the Workspace Agents group
Get all variables: Reserved for, Select workspace, Start date/time, End date/time, Location, Purpose of visit, Additional comments.
Send message to discord channel for the rejected reservation
Send rejection email to the user reserved for
Send message to discord channel for the approved reservation

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Ask for approval from users in the Workspace Agents group
Send message to discord channel for the rejected reservation
Send rejection email to the user reserved for
Send message to discord channel for the approved reservation
Get all variables: Reserved for, Select workspace, Start date/time, End date/time, Location, Purpose of visit, Additional comments.
